overall.description: First-person gameplay footage exploring a futuristic corporate exhibition facility with clean modern architecture. The player character moves through ground floor exhibition spaces, ascends a staircase, and navigates curved upper corridors with large windows overlooking a futuristic cityscape, passing digital displays and signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: ground floor exhibition lobby with vehicle displays

agents.ego_description: walking through ground floor exhibition space past vehicle displays and FORGE signage, holding a pistol

entered.detail: large illuminated sign with 'FORGE' text on white background
glass case containing glowing purple energy core
futuristic military vehicle on exhibition pedestal
large glass doors leading to exterior

segments.scene_description: The player begins in a modern exhibition lobby with polished marble floors and high ceilings. A large 'FORGE' sign is prominently displayed, alongside a glass case containing a glowing purple energy core. The space features futuristic military vehicles on pedestals and yellow geometric wall accents.

scene_state.functional_zone: modern staircase with glass railings connecting floors

events.description: begins ascending staircase from ground floor exhibition area

agents.ego_description: walking up the staircase with glass railings to reach the upper floor

entered.detail: wide staircase with wooden steps and metal edges
transparent glass panels with metal frames along stairs

segments.scene_description: The player ascends a modern staircase with wooden treads and glass railings. The space is enclosed with artificial lighting, transitioning from the open ground floor to the upper level.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper curved corridor with reception desk and mech displays

events.description: exits staircase into upper curved corridor with large windows
passes GUILD reception desk with illuminated signage

agents.ego_description: walking along curved upper corridor past reception desk and large digital displays showing mechs

entered.detail: reception counter with 'GUILD' illuminated signage and wooden paneling
large vertical digital displays showing futuristic mech robots
long curved LED light fixture following corridor curve

segments.scene_description: The player emerges into a spacious curved corridor with floor-to-ceiling windows on the right overlooking a futuristic cityscape. A prominent 'GUILD' reception desk sits in the center, while large digital displays on the left show various mech designs. The architecture features clean white walls and curved ceiling light fixtures.

scene_state.functional_zone: inner corridor with skylights and office space

events.description: enters narrower inner corridor with skylights and yellow floor markings
briefly enters office space with orange wall art before turning back

agents.ego_description: moving through inner corridor with skylights, briefly entering an office area with orange wall decorations

entered.detail: narrow corridor with glass ceiling panels allowing natural light
room with desks, chairs, and orange abstract wall art
large abstract orange and white graphic on wall

segments.scene_description: The player moves into a narrower interior corridor featuring glass skylights in the ceiling and yellow safety striping on the floor. The space transitions into an office area with orange abstract wall art and modern furniture before the player turns back.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved corridor with city view and holographic displays

events.description: returns to curved corridor with large windows and city view
approaches large circular holographic display showing technical diagrams

agents.ego_description: walking back through curved corridor observing cityscape and digital displays, approaching large circular screen

entered.detail: large vertical screen displaying circular technical diagrams with green and white graphics
futuristic city buildings visible through curved glass windows
digital screen showing 'D.A.W.G' text and vehicle schematics

segments.scene_description: The player returns to the curved upper corridor with expansive views of a futuristic cityscape through floor-to-ceiling windows. The player approaches a large circular holographic display showing technical schematics, then passes additional digital signage including one labeled 'D.A.W.G' with vehicle deployment information.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a grand corporate exhibition lobby up into a high-tech upper gallery overlooking a futuristic city. It begins on polished marble floors beneath high ceilings, passing a glowing purple energy core and military vehicles displayed near a prominent FORGE sign. As the camera ascends a modern staircase with wooden treads and glass railings, the open lobby gives way to an enclosed transition before emerging into a spacious curved corridor. The scene then expands to reveal floor-to-ceiling windows and a GUILD reception desk, shifting briefly into a narrower office area with glass skylights and orange abstract art before turning back toward the main gallery. Finally, the camera glides past a large circular holographic schematic and digital signage labeled D.A.W.G. while maintaining a sweeping view of the cityscape.
